modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the return status of hardware items

full_description_text:  
The user called in to ask when they would receive their hard drive back. They also mentioned wanting to return a credit card reader. It seems they are a bit anxious about the return process and just want to know the status of their items.
short_description: Inquiry about the return status of hardware items
description: The user called in to ask when they would receive their hard drive back. They also mentioned wanting to return a credit card reader. It seems they are a bit anxious about the return process and just want to know the status of their items.
